reviews.comment:
Voy de Buenos Aires a Mar del Plata, por años que no voy, y por nostalgia quise pasar. Recordar cuando mi viejo paraba. Pero nunca más. Me pararon en la entrada de Dolores(pasada obligatoria) y una agente desagradable pero de muy buenos modos me retuvo el registro por más de media hora para averiguar antecedentes. NUNCA MAS PASARE O ENTRARÉ A DOLORES CIUDAD O AL ACA

(Translated by Google)
I'm traveling from Buenos Aires to Mar del Plata, something I haven't done in years, and I wanted to stop there out of nostalgia. I wanted to remember when my dad used to stop there. But never again. I was stopped at the entrance to Dolores (a mandatory stop) and a rude but polite officer held onto my license for over half an hour to check my record. I WILL NEVER AGAIN PASS THROUGH OR ENTER DOLORES CITY OR THE ACA (Argentine Customs Authority).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHdXByNGxRRRAB
